css: .card { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.55; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: left; padding: 18px; background: #fafaf7; } .card.nightMode, .nightMode .card { color: #e8e8e8; background: #1e1e1e; } .setup { padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(56,189,248,0.08); border-left: 3px solid #38bdf8; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 16px; } .nightMode .setup { background: rgba(56,189,248,0.14); } .question { font-size: 19px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; } .nightMode .question { color: #f1f5f9; } .answer { margin-top: 14px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.10); border-left: 3px solid #22c55e; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; } .nightMode .answer { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.16); } .why { margin-top: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 15px; color: #4b4b4b; } .nightMode .why { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #cbd5e1; } .why-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #6b6b6b; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; } .nightMode .why-label { color: #94a3b8; } code { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Menlo, monospace; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.92em; } .nightMode code { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .source { margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.2); font-size: 13px; color: #6b6b6b; font-style: italic; } .nightMode .source { border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #94a3b8; } img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; } table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 15px; } th, td { padding: 6px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
